mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, book_id, book_title, book_cover, quantity, unit_price, total_price, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.bookId}, #{item.bookTitle}, #{item.bookCover}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.totalPrice}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime})
